title: Interpret AGV BUMP Exception Codes On The Bump Fault Screen
summary: Use the documented BUMP exception codes in the source manual to identify whether an AGV BUMP fault corresponds to a front collision bar trigger or an obstacle avoidance trigger, and record the interpretation with the AGV fault details.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing an AGV BUMP fault in RMS or on the AGV Bump Fault Screen and you need to interpret the documented meaning of exception code 21057 or 21060 from the source manual.
not_for: Do not use for exception codes other than 21057 or 21060.
Do not use to infer corrective actions or fault meanings beyond the source-provided exception descriptions.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the AGV BUMP fault information, identify the displayed exception code, compare it to the documented code mapping, and record the interpreted meaning with the Robot ID and RMS fault description.

safety_notes: This runbook is a reference/interpretation aid only and does not authorize physical intervention or unsupported recovery actions.

The source states that before going inside the grid (the Dance Floor), specific AGV fault information should be gathered first: Robot ID, fault description from RMS, whether the AGV is holding a bin and tote ID, and whether an AGV under a rack is the empty AGV for that zone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to RMS or the AGV Bump Fault Screen

access_required: Access to RMS or the AGV Bump Fault Screen
system_preconditions: An AGV BUMP fault is available to review in RMS or on the AGV Bump Fault Screen.
external_references: OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual, section 5.8.2.1, BUMP fault code / Table 5-1 AGV Exception Codes

visual_references.description: Figure 5-2 AGV "Bump" Fault Screen used to identify where BUMP fault information is displayed.

steps.title: Open or view the AGV Bump Fault Screen or related fault information
steps.purpose: Access the AGV fault details needed to interpret the BUMP exception code.
steps.instruction: Open or view the AGV Bump Fault Screen or related RMS fault information for the affected AGV.
steps.expected_result: The AGV BUMP fault details are visible for review.
steps.healthy_condition: The affected AGV fault information is displayed and available for inspection.
steps.failure_condition: The BUMP fault information for the affected AGV cannot be viewed or identified.

actions.label: View BUMP fault information
actions.exact_action: Open or view the AGV Bump Fault Screen or related fault information for the affected AGV.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV "Bump" Fault Screen shown in Figure 5-2, used as the reference screen for BUMP fault information.

stop_or_escalate_if: The affected AGV's BUMP fault information cannot be located in RMS or on the AGV Bump Fault Screen.

steps.title: Locate the displayed BUMP exception code
steps.purpose: Identify the specific exception code that must be interpreted.
steps.instruction: Locate the displayed exception code associated with the BUMP fault.
steps.expected_result: A specific BUMP exception code is identified from the displayed fault information.
steps.healthy_condition: The exception code is clearly visible and can be read for comparison.
steps.failure_condition: No exception code is visible, or the displayed value is unclear.

actions.label: Identify exception code
actions.exact_action: Locate the displayed exception code for the BUMP fault.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The BUMP fault display area where the exception code information appears.

stop_or_escalate_if: The exception code is not shown or cannot be read from the available fault information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Table 5-1: AGV Exception Codes includes Exception Code 21057 and Exception Code 21060.

steps.title: Compare the displayed code to the documented values
steps.purpose: Use the source-backed code mapping to determine the documented meaning of the BUMP exception.
steps.instruction: Compare the displayed exception code to the documented values in the source manual.
steps.expected_result: The displayed code is matched to a documented exception meaning or identified as not covered by the source.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed code matches one of the documented values: 21057 or 21060.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed code does not match the documented values in the source.

actions.label: Compare code to source mapping
actions.exact_action: Compare the displayed code to the documented values in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The BUMP fault screen context while comparing the displayed exception code to the documented code meanings.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed exception code does not match 21057 or 21060.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Exception Code 21057 — Robot front collision bar triggers.
Exception Code 21060 — The robot triggers the obstacle avoidance.

steps.title: Interpret code 21057 as front collision bar triggered
steps.purpose: Apply the documented meaning for exception code 21057.
steps.instruction: If the code is 21057, record that the robot front collision bar triggered.
steps.expected_result: Code 21057 is interpreted using the source-provided meaning.
steps.healthy_condition: The interpretation recorded for code 21057 is "Robot front collision bar triggers."
steps.failure_condition: A different meaning is assigned to code 21057 or the interpretation is not recorded.

actions.label: Apply 21057 meaning
actions.exact_action: If the code is 21057, record that the robot front collision bar triggered.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed code is 21057 but the source meaning cannot be confirmed from the provided documentation.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Exception Code 21057 — Robot front collision bar triggers.

steps.title: Interpret code 21060 as obstacle avoidance triggered
steps.purpose: Apply the documented meaning for exception code 21060.
steps.instruction: If the code is 21060, record that the robot triggered obstacle avoidance.
steps.expected_result: Code 21060 is interpreted using the source-provided meaning.
steps.healthy_condition: The interpretation recorded for code 21060 is "The robot triggers the obstacle avoidance."
steps.failure_condition: A different meaning is assigned to code 21060 or the interpretation is not recorded.

actions.label: Apply 21060 meaning
actions.exact_action: If the code is 21060, record that the robot triggered obstacle avoidance.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed code is 21060 but the source meaning cannot be confirmed from the provided documentation.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Exception Code 21060 — The robot triggers the obstacle avoidance.

steps.title: Record the Robot ID, RMS fault description, and interpreted meaning
steps.purpose: Capture the documented AGV fault details together with the interpreted exception meaning for accurate support records.
steps.instruction: Record the Robot ID and the fault description from RMS together with the interpreted exception meaning.
steps.expected_result: The AGV fault record includes the Robot ID, RMS fault description, and the documented meaning of the exception code.
steps.healthy_condition: The record includes Robot ID, RMS fault description, and the correct interpretation for code 21057 or 21060.
steps.failure_condition: The record is incomplete, missing the Robot ID or RMS fault description, or includes an unsupported interpretation.

actions.label: Record AGV fault details
actions.exact_action: Record the Robot ID and the fault description from RMS together with the interpreted exception meaning.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV Bump Fault Screen context while capturing the Robot ID and fault information for documentation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed exception code does not match the documented values 21057 or 21060.
Required AGV fault details such as Robot ID or RMS fault description are unavailable.
Additional fault meaning or corrective action would need to be inferred beyond the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have the following information: Robot ID; Fault description from RMS; Does RMS think the faulted AGV is holding a bin? If so, what tote ID?; If faulted AGV is under a rack, is that AGV the empty AGV for that zone?
Exception Code 21057 — Robot front collision bar triggers.
Exception Code 21060 — The robot triggers the obstacle avoidance.

success_criteria: The displayed AGV BUMP exception code is identified and matched to a documented source value.
Code 21057 is recorded as "Robot front collision bar triggers" when present.
Code 21060 is recorded as "The robot triggers the obstacle avoidance" when present.
The Robot ID and RMS fault description are recorded together with the interpreted exception meaning.
healthy_conditions: The AGV BUMP fault information is visible in RMS or on the AGV Bump Fault Screen.
The displayed exception code matches one of the documented values in the source.
The recorded interpretation exactly matches the source wording for code 21057 or 21060.
failure_conditions: The BUMP fault information cannot be accessed or read.
The displayed exception code is not 21057 or 21060.
The user attempts to infer additional meanings or corrective actions not supported by the source.
Required AGV fault details such as Robot ID or RMS fault description are missing.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the displayed exception code does not match the documented values 21057 or 21060.
Escalate if the BUMP fault information cannot be viewed or the exception code cannot be read.
Do not infer additional fault meanings or corrective actions beyond the source-provided exception descriptions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference screen for AGV BUMP fault information and exception code interpretation.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Exception Code 21057 — Robot front collision bar triggers.
Exception Code 21060 — The robot triggers the obstacle avoidance.

Before going inside the grid (a.k.a. the Dance Floor), make sure to have the following information: Robot ID; Fault description from RMS; Does RMS think the faulted AGV is holding a bin? If so, what tote ID?; If faulted AGV is under a rack, is that AGV the empty AGV for that zone?

missing_details: The source packet does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source packet does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required for this reference activity.
The source packet does not provide a detailed field-by-field layout of where the exception code appears on the screen beyond Figure 5-2.
The source packet does not define actions for exception codes other than 21057 and 21060.
